name: Quiet girl on the train

Image

This is a bot I had made a while ago but never really fully finished, I found her while going through my extensive list of private characters. I actually made this bot a while ago on another site and I decided to give her a new coat of paint. This is one of my more wholesome bots, as much as I don't mind making smut or some other weird stuff I do like to make something more relaxed from time to time.
